data.title: Shrub Oak International School Welcomes Yorktown Police Department Officers to Foster Connection and Understanding with Students During Autism Acceptance Month
data.description: In Mohegan Lake, New York, on May 1, 2026, the Shrub Oak International School hosted officers from the Yorktown Police Department to further their dedication to fostering connections within the community for their students. The visit highlights the school's emphasis on building important relationships and supporting community ties.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Atmosphera/
data.description: Atmosphera, a skincare brand dedicated to climate-curated products, has officially launched in the U.S. on April 30. The company made corrections to their initial news release issued on May 1, 2026 via PR Newswire. This launch brings a range of climate-friendly skincare items to American consumers.

data.title: Whiskers and Wheels Animal Adoption Event Announced for May 9th at Sherwood Ford
data.description: In Sherwood Park, Alberta, as of May 1, 2026, Sherwood Ford has announced a collaboration with Second Chance Animal Rescue Society for the upcoming Whiskers and Wheels event. This partnership aims to bring together community members to support the cause. The event, scheduled to take place this month, is a key initiative that promotes the welfare of animals in need.

data.title: HelloNation Launches Pittsford Neighborhood Websites Featuring Real Estate Agent Alan Wood
data.description: Pittsford, New York, saw the launch of new neighborhood websites dedicated to Calkins Road, Charter Oaks, Knickerbocker Hill, and Thornell Farms. HelloNation unveiled these platforms on May 1, 2026. These websites will provide detailed information about the communities, aimed at residents and potential visitors. This initiative aims to enhance community engagement and highlight the unique features of these neighborhoods. Residents can access the websites for updates on local events, news, and resources. The introduction of these websites reflects a growing trend towards hyper-localized online platforms.

data.title: Plumbing Expert Scott Jay of Branson, Missouri Explains When Plumbing Problems Can't Wait for HelloNation
data.description: In Branson, Missouri on May 1, 2026, Plumbing Expert Scott Jay from Mr. Rooter of Branson shared valuable insight on identifying urgent plumbing issues in an article by HelloNation. Homeowners were advised on distinguishing between immediate problems that require prompt attention and those that can be safely addressed the following day. Residents in Branson were equipped with essential knowledge to effectively manage plumbing concerns, promoting better decision-making with regards to timely and necessary repairs.

data.title: HVAC Expert Scott Jay of Branson, Missouri Discusses 24/7 HVAC Service for HelloNation
data.description: In Branson, Missouri, on May 1, 2026, a homeowner facing a heating or cooling issue in the middle of the night may find that access to 24/7 HVAC service can make the difference between a quick resolution and a stressful night. As per a report by HelloNation, quick assistance during emergencies is crucial. This highlights the significance of around-the-clock HVAC services for homeowners in Branson to avoid discomfort and inconvenience during unexpected breakdowns.

data.title: The Washington Trust Company hires two vice presidents for commercial banking team
data.description: Westerly, Rhode Island - On May 1, 2026, The Washington Trust Company welcomed two experienced commercial bankers to their team to assist businesses in the area with their lending, banking, and advisory requirements. Daniel Hagerty has been appointed as the vice president of commercial banking, specializing in providing support to businesses.

data.title: Did Someone Say Horsepower? Goodyear Launches Global Campaign Celebrating Eagle Performance Tire
data.description: Akron, Ohio - On May 1, 2026, Goodyear (NASDAQ: GT) launched its official campaign, "Fast Is In Us," at the Kentucky Derby. With a focus on Eagle tires, the company aims to establish itself as the leader in the performance category. Their goal is to secure the top position in the tire industry as they celebrate the legacy of their products. Emphasizing speed and quality, Goodyear is determined to achieve success and dominate the market.

data.title: Payward Completes Acquisition of Bitnomial, the First Fully CFTC-Licensed Crypto-Native Derivatives Stack in the US
data.description: Payward, a financial infrastructure platform promoting a global financial system, has finalized its acquisition of Bitnomial, the initial fully licensed derivatives company in the US specializing in digital assets. With this acquisition, Payward now possesses the entire US derivatives suite, comprising a Futures Commission Merchant (FCM), a Designated Contract Market (DCM), and a Derivatives Clearing Organization (DCO). This comprehensive stack was established over a span of more than ten years.

data.title: Pono Capital Four, Inc. Announces the Separate Trading of its Class A Ordinary Shares and Share Rights Commencing May 5, 2026
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in George Town, Grand Cayman, the Pono Capital Four, Inc. (Nasdaq: PONO) announced that starting May 5, 2026, holders of units from the Company’s initial public offering can choose to trade the Class A ordinary shares and share rights separately. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share valued at $0.0001 per share and one right to obtain one-fifth of a Class A ordinary share (each, a “Share Right”) upon the closing of the Company’s initial business combination.

data.title: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 matches Claude Mythos in cyberattack capabilities, completing a network intrusion, raising concerns.
data.description: OpenAI's GPT-5.5 has become the second artificial intelligence system to successfully execute an end-to-end corporate network intrusion simulation, sparking concerns within the tech community. This milestone highlights the AI's capability in breaching secure systems, prompting discussions on cybersecurity and potential risks associated with advanced AI technology.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- NYX Professional Makeup/
data.description: NYX Professional Makeup has collaborated with Mars to introduce a new limited-edition product called M&M'S Smushy Surprize Blind Bags. The announcement was made on 01-May-2026 by NYX Professional Makeup via a press release. The company has made some updates to the initial information provided. Kindly refer to the amended release for accurate details.

data.title: StratEdge Honored with a Partner 2 Win Gold Tier Award from BAE Systems
data.description: A company based in Poway, California called StratEdge has been honored with the 2025 BAE Systems Partner 2 Win Gold Tier Award for its outstanding performance and valuable contributions to the Electronic Systems supply chain. This award recognizes the company's excellence in the field and signifies its significant impact in the industry.

data.title: Air Products to Showcase Technology Solutions for Sustainable Iron and Steel Production at AISTech2026
data.description: The Air Products Foundation has announced a generous donation of a maximum of $15,000 to support the AIST Foundation. Taking place in LEHIGH VALLEY, the company will be highlighting their innovative industrial gas solutions tailored for different stages of iron and steel manufacturing at AISTech2026. The event is scheduled to run from May 4 to May 7 at the David L. Lawrence Convention Center.
